---
Static
---
!*****> Test Data ID Variables
All shared test data record IDs are defined as variables to support parallel test execution.
When '''testRunId''' is empty (default), IDs are identical to the original hardcoded values.
When '''testRunId''' is set to a unique value (e.g., a timestamp suffix), each test run
operates on its own isolated set of test data, preventing interference between parallel runs.

!define testRunId {}

!***> Text record IDs
!define fitnesseTextId {fitnesseText${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseBlueTextId {fitnesseBlueText${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseRecordTypeSearchTextId {fitnesseRecordTypeSearchText${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseRecordTypeSearchDefTextId {fitnesseRecordTypeSearchDefText${testRunId}}
*!

!***> Metadata IDs
!define fitnesseMetadataTextVarId {fitnesseMetadataTextVar${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseAnotherMetadataTextVarId {fitnesseAnotherMetadataTextVar${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseOnlyOneMetadataTextVarId {fitnesseOnlyOneMetadataTextVar${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseMetadataNumberVarId {fitnesseMetadataNumberVar${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseBlueItemId {fitnesseBlueItem${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseCollectionId {fitnesseCollection${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseCollectionVarId {fitnesseCollectionVar${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseLinkId {fitnesseLink${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseBinaryLinkId {fitnesseBinaryLink${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseRecordInfoGroupId {fitnesseRecordInfoGroup${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseRecordInfoNewGroupId {fitnesseRecordInfoNewGroup${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseGroupId {fitnesseGroup${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseNewGroupId {fitnesseNewGroup${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseCollectIndexTermId {fitnesseCollectIndexTerm${testRunId}}
*!

!***> Search IDs
!define fitnesseSearchTermId {fitnesseSearchTerm${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseSearchTextVarId {fitnesseSearchTextVar${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseSearchIncludePartGroupId {fitnesseSearchIncludePartGroup${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseSearchIncludeGroupId {fitnesseSearchIncludeGroup${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseSearchGroupId {fitnesseSearchGroup${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseSearchId {fitnesseSearch${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseRecordTypeSearchId {fitnesseRecordTypeSearch${testRunId}}
*!

!***> Record type and validation IDs
!define fitnesseRecordTypeId {fitnesseRecordType${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseValidationTypeId {fitnesseValidationType${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseSequenceId {fitnesseSequence${testRunId}}
*!

!***> Permission IDs
!define fitnesseBinaryReadOnAllVisibilitiesRuleId {fitnesseBinaryReadOnAllVisibilitiesRule${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseBinaryReadOnAllVisibilitiesRoleId {fitnesseBinaryReadOnAllVisibilitiesRole${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseTextAdminId {fitnesseTextAdmin${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseTextAdminRuleId {fitnesseTextAdminRule${testRunId}}
*!

!***> Auto-generated presentation IDs
!define fitnessePGroupId {fitnessePGroup${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseOutputPGroupId {fitnesseOutputPGroup${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseNewPGroupId {fitnesseNewPGroup${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseNewOutputPGroupId {fitnesseNewOutputPGroup${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseMetadataPVarId {fitnesseMetadataPVar${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseMetadataOutputPVarId {fitnesseMetadataOutputPVar${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseAnotherMetadataPVarId {fitnesseAnotherMetadataPVar${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseAnotherMetadataOutputPVarId {fitnesseAnotherMetadataOutputPVar${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseOnlyOneMetadataPVarId {fitnesseOnlyOneMetadataPVar${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseOnlyOneMetadataOutputPVarId {fitnesseOnlyOneMetadataOutputPVar${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseMetadataPNumVarId {fitnesseMetadataPNumVar${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseMetadataOutputPNumVarId {fitnesseMetadataOutputPNumVar${testRunId}}
!define fitnessePLinkId {fitnessePLink${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseOutputPLinkId {fitnesseOutputPLink${testRunId}}
!define fitnessePCollVarId {fitnessePCollVar${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseOutputPCollVarId {fitnesseOutputPCollVar${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseBinaryPLinkId {fitnesseBinaryPLink${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseBinaryOutputPLinkId {fitnesseBinaryOutputPLink${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseRecordInfoNewPGroupId {fitnesseRecordInfoNewPGroup${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseRecordInfoNewOutputPGroupId {fitnesseRecordInfoNewOutputPGroup${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseRecordInfoPGroupId {fitnesseRecordInfoPGroup${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseRecordInfoOutputPGroupId {fitnesseRecordInfoOutputPGroup${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseSearchPGroupId {fitnesseSearchPGroup${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseSearchOutputPGroupId {fitnesseSearchOutputPGroup${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseSearchPVarId {fitnesseSearchPVar${testRunId}}
!define fitnesseSearchOutputPVarId {fitnesseSearchOutputPVar${testRunId}}
*!

!***> Legacy training IDs
!define trainingClassLeafletId {trainingClassLeaflet${testRunId}}
!define trainingClassLeafletSearchId {trainingClassLeafletSearch${testRunId}}
!define personalTrainingLeafletValidationId {personalTrainingLeafletValidation${testRunId}}
!define circuitTrainingLeafletNewGroupId {circuitTrainingLeafletNewGroup${testRunId}}
!define circuitTrainingLeafletGroupId {circuitTrainingLeafletGroup${testRunId}}
!define circuitTrainingLeafletValidationId {circuitTrainingLeafletValidation${testRunId}}
!define bigCircuitTrainingLeafletNewGroupId {bigCircuitTrainingLeafletNewGroup${testRunId}}
!define bigCircuitTrainingLeafletGroupId {bigCircuitTrainingLeafletGroup${testRunId}}
!define bigCircuitTrainingLeafletValidationId {bigCircuitTrainingLeafletValidation${testRunId}}
*!
*!
